skills.name: Unity

skills.description: Adit-san builds games with Godot engine, using GDScript and scene-based architecture for indie game projects.

skills.description: Adit-san is learning Unreal Engine for AAA-style game development and visual scripting with Blueprints.

skills.name: C#
skills.description: Adit-san's primary programming language for game development, used extensively with Unity for game logic and systems.

skills.name: JavaScript
skills.description: Adit-san uses JavaScript for frontend and backend web development including React components and Node.js APIs.

skills.name: React
skills.description: Adit-san builds interactive web UIs with React, using hooks, Vite, Tailwind CSS, and Framer Motion for animations.

skills.name: Node.js
skills.description: Adit-san uses Node.js with Express to build REST APIs, including this very portfolio backend.

skills.name: Tailwind CSS
skills.description: Adit-san uses Tailwind CSS for rapid UI styling with utility classes, used in this pixel-art portfolio.

skills.name: Blender
skills.description: Adit-san uses Blender for 3D modeling and asset creation for game development projects.

skills.name: PostgreSQL
skills.description: Adit-san uses PostgreSQL (via Neon) as database for this portfolio backend, managing projects, certificates, and stats.

skills.name: GitHub

about.name: Rahmat Aditya
about.description: Adit-san is a passionate Game Developer and Web Enthusiast from Sumatera Barat, Indonesia. He builds games with Unity and Godot, and web experiences with React and Node.js. Always leveling up, always learning.
